questions.question: A person walks 3 km North, then 2 km East. How far is he from the start (km)?
questions.solution: Step 1: Displacement forms right triangle. Step 2: √( 3² + 2² ) = √13 = 3.61 km. Answer: 3.61.

questions.solution: Step 1: Displacement forms right triangle. Step 2: √( 4² + 3² ) = √25 = 5 km. Answer: 5.
